emails.subject: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) - Guaranty Agreements
emails.body: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) Guaranty Agreements Tanya, Please review the attached document regarding our conversation concerning the back to back arrangement. I believe the highlited information should cover your concerns and it is the same information as was used in the CES documents. Please advise if anything further is needed.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) - Guaranty Agreements
emails.body: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) Guaranty Agreements Tanya, Please review the attached document regarding our conversation concerning the back to back arrangement. I believe the highlited information should cover your concerns and it is the same information as was used in the CES documents. Please advise if anything further is needed.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) - Guaranty Agreements
emails.body: I think this works for covering ENA for any HPL breach; however, I'd like to see explicit language that requires HPL to make ENA whole in the event the counterparty does not pay ENA. Thanks, Tanya

emails.subject: RE: FW: Schedule 1.1(a) - Guaranty Agreements
